title: chrysophyllum marginatum subsp. tomentosum
intro: Chrysophyllum marginatum subsp. tomentosum, commonly known as the velvet star apple, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of the velvet star apple include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
